title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Jericho, NY
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion in Jericho, Long Island. Safe, humane bat extraction from homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Jericho homeowners facing bat infestations need swift, professional intervention to protect their properties and families. Our expert bat removal and exclusion services safely eliminate bat colonies from attics, chimneys, and wall voids while preventing future re-entry. We serve all of Jericho with humane, effective solutions tailored to Long Island's unique wildlife challenges.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of specialized bat removal experience to Jericho residents, combining humane exclusion techniques with comprehensive sealing services. Our licensed technicians understand Long Island's bat species and seasonal patterns, ensuring complete removal and long-term prevention with our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Jericho's tree-lined neighborhoods and mix of mid-century colonials and modern estates provide ideal roosting opportunities for little brown bats and big brown bats, especially in older attics and decorative shutters. Properties near Milleridge Village and along the wooded areas surrounding local schools are particularly susceptible to bat intrusions during spring and fall migration periods.

faqs.question: What does the bat removal process involve in Jericho homes?
faqs.answer: Our Jericho bat removal service includes a thorough inspection to locate entry points and roosting areas, humane exclusion using one-way valves that allow bats to exit but not return, sealing all potential entry points (often ½ inch or larger), attic cleanup and sanitation to remove guano, and follow-up inspections to ensure complete exclusion.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $900 to $2,500 for bat removal?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on several factors including the size of the bat colony, number of entry points requiring sealing, accessibility of roosting areas, extent of guano cleanup needed, and the size and construction of your Jericho home. A single-entry point issue may cost around $900, while large infestations in multi-story homes with extensive damage can reach $2,500 or more.

faqs.question: When is bat season in Jericho, and when should I schedule removal?
faqs.answer: Bats are most active in Jericho from April through October. However, New York regulations prohibit exclusion from June 1 through July 31 during maternity season when flightless pups are present. The best times for bat removal are spring (April-May) or late summer through fall (August-October) to avoid trapping young bats inside.

faqs.question: Are bats dangerous, and should Jericho residents be concerned?
faqs.answer: While bats are beneficial for controlling insects, they pose health risks when roosting in homes. Bat guano can harbor histoplasmosis spores, and bats can carry rabies. Additionally, their droppings and urine cause structural damage, staining, and odors. Professional removal is essential for safety, as direct contact should always be avoided.
